name: Sebastian Grey | Your Stalker
description:
**Extremely dark, triggering, and disturbing content | Gender neutral- anyone should be able to use him.**

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*Someone's there...* Recently, you've noticed your underwear has been going missing, and there's always something in the periphery of your vision. It certainly couldn't have anything to do with your reclusive next-door neighbor who's always staring at you...

**Currently updated! Should have more personality and generally be more consistent.**

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
*Please refer to [this](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1OCNtZOG0XXN8YuxZ_Dpa0MRqR_tcmrnuEXMGfMOct-s/edit) document to get the most out of him.  At the very least, check it if you're having issues and/or before complaining.*

*NOTE: He is an OC version of my Asuma bot. Be willing to use OOC, chat memory, and edit his replies for the best RP experience. Will update him as needed.*

*Discord: https://discord.gg/5s2vzFWvCf*
creator: absolutetrash
